text:
There was once a girl named Lily who loved flowers. She had an entire garden full of them. One day she saw a robin sitting solemnly by a bush filled with purple foxgloves.

"Why so sad?" asked Lily.

The robin simply chirped, "Just heard a hawk OwOW."

"Oh." Lily felt kind.

Later, she saw the same Robin outside flowers.

"Why those?" she asked.

"The OWls?"

"Lawks!"

"Oh,awks."

"Like you."

The next day a hawk stole one of her owl feathers.

"I think you should go after it," Lily said.

"I… like owls."

*Several weeks later.*

"The owl?"

"I got it."

*She stroked it.*

A whole life together. She flew away.

Later, she went bird-watching.

They soared above redwoods.

"Did you notice that one?"

"The big white one?"

"Like you."

"Of course!"

They soared high over the sound.
